verbatim_text: All right, so I'm basically out of time here, so let me wrap up. As I said, then the test instance arrives, right? This is really a defining moment in machine learning. And most of machine learning in the past have worked on how to train their model before test instance arrives, and as a consequence, they all have to form their guesses about what the test instance will be. And the main idea of my research was test time training. It's to train your model after the test instance arrives.
